name: ChalkStream Foods Ltd

Aggregator = sells once, covers multiple farms.
contact_route: Phone 01794 330000; email sales@chalkstreamfoods.co.uk; addr Old Salisbury Lane, Awbridge, Romsey, Hants SO51 0GD

name: Test Valley Trout Ltd
why_them: BTA full member on the Test; part of the Hampshire chalkstream cluster that supplies premium retail; Greatbridge/Test Valley group regained RSPCA Assured membership in 2021 so renewal/maintenance of the standard is a live, recurring cost for them.

name: Houghton Springs Fish Farm Ltd
why_them: BTA full member; established Dorset producer; named in Quality Trout UK accreditation scheme — already invests in third-party assurance, so adding RSPCA Assured automation is an adjacent sell.

name: Bibury Trout Farm

why_them: Members are exactly the LAIA-licensed ornamental/koi retailer audience for the £29 LAIA MCP; bulk member-benefit framing collapses thousands of micro-sales into one deal. Build on existing OATA email draft.
